text: The sidebar nav label for the Configuration page MUST read 'Agent configuration'
The sidebar nav label for the Widget page MUST read 'Widget configuration'
The Team page table header column MUST read 'Team member' instead of 'Member'
The role label for the 'agent' role MUST read 'Escalation agent' instead of 'Agent'
The Escalation slider MUST display 'Conservative' left-justified and 'Aggressive' right-justified, neither extending beyond the slider width
The Purchase button hover color MUST darken on hover
Analytics page content MUST be merged into the Dashboard page
The Analytics sidebar nav item MUST be removed after merging into Dashboard
Newly added team members MUST receive a welcome email with a temporary strong password
Temporary passwords for team members MUST expire periodically
Users with expired passwords MUST be flagged as not-active so the merchant admin can take action
Team members MUST be able to change their temporary password
The admin logo in the upper left MUST use primary-logo-no-wordmark.svg
The wordmark 'Customer Experience' MUST appear to the right of the logo
Dark Mode MUST be the default mode
Dark Mode MUST use a palette of greys rather than blue/purple
The main page display areas MUST have a thinner border in Dark Mode
The sticky navbar at the top of the page MUST be medium-light grey in Light Mode
The conversation filter control background MUST NOT be white in Dark Mode
The conversation history background MUST NOT be light pink
The Agent Red AI label in conversation view MUST have a lighter grey background, not dark red
The Agent Red icon-master MUST be displayed to the right of the text 'Agent Red AI' near each AI response
The chat widget MUST support a Dark Mode option
The Live Preview MUST support a Dark Mode option
Integration logos for Zendesk, Google Analytics, Mailchimp, Stripe and Shopify MUST have a height of 150px
A master test plan MUST synthesize all requirements into a single test with 100% pass rate before submission
The master test MUST include a tested plan to execute a non-disruptive upgrade of the production environment
A parallel production-capable dev/test environment MUST be created for future releases
Non-disruptive upgrade MUST be proven before getting Shopify app store approval
The standalone admin chat UI MUST use Agent Red colors, not default blue
The standalone admin MUST behave exactly as if it were a standard customer admin for any merchant storefront
The default widget colors and styling MUST match Agent Red brand colors, customizable from there by the merchant
A detailed step-by-step process for non-disruptive upgrade MUST include provisioning scripts and a regression test package
Only fixes to open-source artifacts MUST flow back to the AGNTCY project, nothing else
A standard pre-flight checklist MUST be executed for any production deployment
The pre-flight checklist MUST always conclude with a detailed live verification that a customer tenant can be created and configured with no errors or defects
The KB page toolbar layout MUST have Search input on top row (left-justified), and Category, Status, Scan for conflicts, Export CSV, Import, and + Add article all on one row below (bottom-justified)
The default chat widget colors MUST be Agent Red colors rather than blue
End-to-end tests MUST be run on a freshly initialized environment, not one with stale data
100% UI test coverage means every possible input and value for every possible state has been checked
100% UI test coverage MUST include every button pushed, every selection selected, every state for a given set of inputs saved
100% UI test coverage MUST include Light/Dark mode verification for every test
100% UI test coverage MUST include testing every type of deliberate misconfiguration
UI testing MUST include the first-login case on a freshly initialized environment as superadmin
UI testing MUST include the 'I lost my API keys' path
UI testing MUST include team member creation, re-issuance of team member API keys, and removal of team members
The term 'effort' MUST NOT be used in project discussions; use tokens consumed, elapsed time, or probability of regression instead
The 'Save changes' control on configuration pages MUST be relabeled 'Save draft inputs'
The page-level 'Discard' control at the top of configuration pages MUST be removed (Discard is only in the CONFIGURATION control group)
The tier label 'professional' MUST be capitalized as 'Professional'
The 'Inactive' badge MUST be removed when the CONFIGURATION control group already shows 'Pending' state
Brand voice MUST be a mandatory configuration field
Language support at launch MUST be English only, with Spanish and French planned next
All configuration page changes are drafts until activated using the 'Activate' control
The 'Save draft inputs' control MUST always be at the bottom of each configuration page
Agent configuration, Knowledge base, Quick actions, and Widget configuration pages MUST all follow the same workflow: start at top, enter data scrolling down, Save draft inputs control at bottom
A freshly initialized tenant MUST show zero conversations on the Dashboard (no synthetic historical data)
All transient keys, values, URLs, and variables that change between builds or tenant environments MUST NOT be hardcoded; they MUST be retrieved from tenant config database or env.local
The widget MUST NOT be usable if the system is not active and has never been activated
The activation control MUST have three dispositions: Red/'Deactivate' (disable widget), Green/'Activate' (ready to activate), Yellow/'Activate' (blocked by missing mandatory config)
When the system is initialized and some mandatory inputs are missing, the activation control MUST show Yellow/'Activate' disposition
Once the system is active with no draft changes, the activation control default MUST be Red/'Disable'
Once all mandatory draft config changes are present, the activation control MUST show Green/'Activate'
When configuration becomes Active, the widget MUST immediately become available
The Deactivate action MUST go through a confirmation dialog
After deactivating, the active config still exists, so the activation control MUST show Green/'Activate'
A UI glossary MUST be maintained and Claude MUST encourage consistent use of glossary terms
Glossary term: 'control' = element that triggers a change of system state (buttons, selectors, filters, checkboxes, radio buttons, toggles)
Glossary term: 'input' = element that elaborates the future desired state when the next control is triggered
Glossary term: 'card' = a logically interdependent group of elements bounded by a bordered box, may contain controls, information, and inputs
Glossary term: 'page' = a full admin UI view accessed via sidebar navigation
Glossary term: 'picker' = a color or date selection element
Glossary term: 'configuration manager' = the top-level CONFIGURATION control group (Activate/Discard/Roll back)
Glossary term: 'configuration pages' = the individual pages within the configuration manager
Glossary term: 'error banner' = inline error notification; 'error pop-up' = overlay error notification
Glossary term: 'badge' = a small label indicator (e.g., status badge, role badge)
The standalone admin MUST be secured with a simple password to avoid casual trespassers
All current logo images MUST be replaced with the updated files from branding/logo/SVG/ and branding/logo/PNG/
Release 1.0 MUST be full-featured and competitive, comparable to Tidio in features and usability
The 1.0 user experience MUST be polished and refined, comparable or superior in styling and usability to Tidio
The chat UI MUST be responsive and web-based, supporting both mobile and desktop customer users
The Admin UI MUST support desktop users (web-based)
Pricing and packaging decisions are orthogonal to release scope — base product plus optional features may be required for 1.0
The admin UI logo in upper left corner MUST be primary-logo-light.svg (or primary-logo-dark.svg for Dark mode)
The text 'Agent Red Customer Experience' MUST NOT appear as visible text — only as tooltip/on-hover label or alt text
Dark Mode MUST be supported as an important detail of the admin UI
Mantine v7 MUST be used as the UI component library for the standalone admin
The active selection text color in the sidebar MUST be white, not red
The chat history background color MUST be #19191A
If the taupe border (#938a87) cannot be 0.2px, the border color MUST be changed to #363636
The Light/Dark toggle MUST retain Dark Mode colors even in Light Mode, since the sticky nav bar retains dark grey in Light Mode
The owner personality note MUST record: Mike values honest feedback — never exaggerate the quality or impact of his input
Conversation volume chart MUST show data only from the actual deployment date, not synthetic historical data
Dashboard tooltips MUST contain links that point directly to the appropriate documentation page anchor
Inbox search MUST return results matching the search term (e.g., searching 'product' must find messages containing 'product')
Escalation action MUST ask which team member or which escalation category to route to
Escalated conversations MUST show up when using the escalation filter
UI tests MUST be treated as Repeatable Processes — when a defect is identified, add a test for it to the procedure before finding a fix
The chat widget and chat UI MUST be available on the admin console so the administrator can test the agent without accessing the storefront
Documentation links MUST use HTTPS, not HTTP
Quick action prompt buttons with hidden prompts MUST be displayed in the message pane
Widget color configuration MUST be picked up by the widget after being saved
Greeting message (e.g., 'Hi there! How can I help you today <FIRST_NAME>?') MUST be picked up by the widget after being saved
Quick actions MUST have examples pre-populated in the initial setup
The 'Icon' input on the 'Create quick action' dialog MUST contain guidance or examples for where to obtain an icon
The 'Sort order' input MUST be removed from quick action creation since order is set per page
Quick actions MUST appear in the chat UI on the administration page for preview
The 'Test mode' toggle MUST appear on the nav bar at the top of the page
The 'Test mode' toggle MUST be the first step in the setup wizard flow
There MUST be no visible control for widget drop-shadow on the widget config page (it needs to be added)
There MUST be controls for changing the widget icon and the Agent Red avatar at the top of the chat UI
Pre-chat form and offline form greeting options MUST have explanations of what they do
The chat UI MUST have a control that allows users to expand it horizontally (resizable width)
The chat UI MUST be click-draggable to other regions of the browser window
Auto-open MUST be configurable per-page as part of Quick Actions configuration
The chat UI input area MUST have three text lines of height
The chat display area MUST have scroll-bars or scroll controls
Launcher position configuration MUST include controls for vertical and horizontal offset from the edges of the browser display area
The dashboard MUST display the merchant's storefront name in large type above the word 'Dashboard'

Each dashboard display area MUST have a tooltip/link to relevant documentation (Total conversations, Avg response time, Resolution rate, Customer satisfaction, Escalation rate, Daily conversation volume, Recent conversations, Top intents)
'Scan for conflicts', 'Export to CSV', and 'Import' MUST have on-hover tooltips with links to documentation
Each analytics display area MUST have a tooltip/link to relevant documentation (Intents breakdown, Knowledge gaps, etc.)
Each Configuration page section MUST have a tooltip/link to documentation (Brand & persona, Policies, Escalation, Custom instructions, Language, Test mode)
The 'Primary color' label MUST be renamed to 'Header left color'
The 'Header gradient end' label MUST be renamed to 'Header right color'
There MUST be a toggle to enable/disable gradient on the widget header
The gradient toggle default MUST be disabled, with the entire header using the Header left color
The Header left color and Header right color pickers MUST be side-by-side rather than stacked
Configurations MUST be nameable and it MUST be possible to select and apply a named saved configuration from a list of previously saved configurations
It MUST be possible to delete previously saved configurations
Each previously saved configuration MUST have a date-stamp indicating the last time it was applied
Page assignments MUST display all available pages in a single column, not via a drop-down menu
Prompt template variables MUST be displayed below the Prompt template input box (like greeting message variables), not in a separate tab
The Role selector MUST replace the textual role names displayed inline, not in the Actions column
'Roles & permissions' MUST be an on-hover tooltip pop-up for the 'Role' column heading, not a separate page section
When 'Escalation agent' role is selected, the team member MUST also be assigned to one or more escalation categories (Sales, Support, Service, Account, Technical assistance, General inquiry)
It MUST be possible to toggle each team member between enabled and disabled
Each Billing & usage display area MUST have a tooltip/link to documentation (Current plan, Conversations used, Pack balance, Current overage, Estimated overage cost, Daily usage)
The Purchase button hover color MUST match the sidebar menu item hover color

Sidebar page order MUST be: 1) Dashboard, 2) Inbox, 3) Team, 4) Agent configuration, 5) Knowledge base, 6) Quick actions, 7) Widget configuration, 8) Integrations, 9) Billing, 10) Setup wizard, 11) Documentation
The Wizard MUST have two purposes: (1) configuring Test mode and (2) ensuring merchants complete configuration for initial activation

Wizard step order MUST be: 1) Mode, 2) Team (initial setup only), 3) Agent configuration, 4) Knowledge base, 5) Quick actions, 6) Widget configuration (initial setup only), 7) Integrations (initial setup only), 8) Go live
In Test mode, only fields affecting prompting and AI behavior MUST be changeable in the wizard
In Test mode, the Go live step MUST show a checklist of values changed from Standard mode values
In Standard mode (first-time setup), the Go live checklist MUST list mandatory inputs required for system operation
When the system is Inactive, a 'Welcome' message pop-up MUST appear reminding the admin the system is not yet active
The 'Inactive' indicator in the sticky nav-bar MUST navigate to the Wizard when clicked
'Review and launch' wizard step MUST be renamed to 'Custom AI instructions'
The Wizard MUST be used ONLY for (a) initial setup and (b) Test mode setup (Option 1 — not for Standard mode changes post-activation)
Once Agent Red is active, all Standard mode changes MUST be committed and activated per-page via sidebar navigation
The admin MUST be able to select the percentage of new sessions randomly added to the test group
When test mode activates, the mode indicator in the sticky nav-bar MUST switch to display 'Test mode'
The password reset flow MUST NOT require the user to know their current password; they enter email and receive a confirmation link to choose a new password
Email sending MUST use Titan SMTP with credentials from env.local (TITAN_USER_ID, TITAN_PASSWORD) via smtp.titan.email:465 SSL/TLS
Conversation volume chart duration MUST match the selected timeframe (7d/14d/30d/90d) irrespective of data availability
Conversation volume chart MUST NOT display historical data from before the environment deployment date
Configuration status 'Not configured' MUST NOT exist; valid states are 'Activated' and 'Pending' only
The 'Roll back' option MUST NOT be available if the environment has never been Activated
Test environment testing MUST begin with a Pending state tenant, complete activation, then send test messages before testing Inbox and other pages (Option C)
The 'Discard' control MUST be functional and must work correctly
The error banner close ('X') control MUST be functional
Knowledge base articles MUST display Category and Status in the article list
Category and Status filters on the KB page MUST return results that match the filter criteria
KB changes MUST participate in the Save-then-Activate flow: KB creates/edits/deletes mark config as Pending, activation deploys KB state alongside other config, Discard reverts KB changes
The KB 'Freshness' value MUST NOT display '--' (must have a clear meaning)
There MUST be a way to restore (unarchive) an article that has been archived
Quick action creation MUST mark config as Pending in the CONFIGURATION state
The Auto-open control on Quick Actions MUST be functional
The Agent avatar MUST be uploaded as a PNG file (not a URL), with validation, resize, and aspect ratio crop capabilities
The 'Cross-session learning' toggle MUST be greyed out or cause save to fail for tiers below Professional+
Add-on modules MUST each indicate which entitlements are required for activation (Starter, Pro, Pro+, Enterprise)
Add-on modules not available for the current tier MUST NOT be subscribable; the Subscribe control MUST show the minimum required entitlement
The Upgrade path MUST display entitlement tiers in order (Starter -> Pro -> Pro+ -> Enterprise) with an option to Upgrade to each
Completing an Upgrade MUST change the available subscribable add-on modules to match the new entitlement level
The 'Priority support' add-on MUST be deferred to post-launch and removed from the admin UI
The 'White-label package' add-on MUST be deferred to post-launch and removed from the admin UI
The Light/Dark toggle MUST retain Dark Mode colors even in Light Mode since the sticky nav header retains Dark Mode colors in Light Mode
All references to the old GitHub repo URL MUST be updated to the new URL: https://github.com/mike-remakerdigital/agent-red
